'''sachuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:igil|igil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:igil|igil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sachuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchikith|sæchikith]] || [[word:sæchikij|sæchikij]] || [[word:sæchikish|sæchikish]] || [[word:sæchiki|sæchiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachuchukuth|sachuchukuth]] || [[word:sachuchukuj|sachuchukuj]] || [[word:sachuchukush|sachuchukush]] || [[word:sachuchuku|sachuchuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachukuth|sachukuth]] || [[word:sachukuj|sachukuj]] || [[word:sachukush|sachukush]] || [[word:sachuku|sachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachufkuth|sachufkuth]] || [[word:sachufkuj|sachufkuj]] || [[word:sachufkush|sachufkush]] || [[word:sachufkuf|sachufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachukuthu|sachukuthu]] || [[word:sachukuju|sachukuju]] || [[word:sachukushu|sachukushu]] || [[word:sachukuku|sachukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachukuth|sachukuth]] || [[word:sachukuj|sachukuj]] || [[word:sachukush|sachukush]] || [[word:sachuku|sachuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachukuthul|sachukuthul]] || [[word:sachukujul|sachukujul]] || [[word:sachukushul|sachukushul]] || [[word:sachukukul|sachukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachukuthuthu|sachukuthuthu]] || [[word:sachukujuju|sachukujuju]] || [[word:sachukushushu|sachukushushu]] || [[word:sachukuku|sachukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachukuthun|sachukuthun]] || [[word:sachukujun|sachukujun]] || [[word:sachukushun|sachukushun]] || [[word:sachukukun|sachukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachukuthuoro|sachukuthuoro]] || [[word:sachukujuoro|sachukujuoro]] || [[word:sachukushuoro|sachukushuoro]] || [[word:sachukukuoro|sachukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
